microsoft_ft: Owned the **technical playbook** for Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 build** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defined product requirements, self-service scheduling workflows, and success criteria that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Served as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and navigating complex technical and stakeholder requirements.

Built an **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly translating field patterns into product improvements with Engineering.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects that reshaped the continuous validation roadmap.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by running hands-on demos and training sessions across 14 key Azure teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and building a reusable demo playbook.

Conducted **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical workflow gaps, directly influencing the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation — translating complex technical needs into scoped feature requirements.
Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, directly improving deal velocity for enterprise customers.

Led discovery with 20+ service teams to **identify 81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — translating complex multi-team workflows into a clear, scoped POV plan.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and make high-impact prioritization decisions with quantified field data.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — handling technical objections and aligning IT, Ops, and Engineering.

Prioritized 40+ high-priority backlog tickets and facilitated Agile ceremonies to **stabilize the developer intake process**, accelerating team velocity and reducing friction across cross-functional buying committees.

Partnered with Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting the software deployment cycle by 25% and feeding workflow patterns back to product teams to improve platform scalability.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals — directly mirroring the contractor and trade-business workflows Bobyard serves.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and Google presence to drive pipeline quality for a trade services business.

Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks — translating complex field data into clear business impact, the same value-translation skill central to running POV engagements.

skills_priority: Technical: Azure, APIs, CI/CD, distributed systems, Power BI, SQL, Python, YAML

AI / Automation: AI agents, workflow automation, LLM-powered tools, semantic search, prompt engineering

'Translating complex workflows into clear value' from the JD mirrored in pro_painters bullet 3 — framing financial analysis as the same value-translation skill the SE role requires.
